item.title: Tech Crunch Founder Summit
item.description: Save up to $190 on Tech Crunch Founder Summit 2026, learn from peers and operators

item.title: Founder Summit 2026: Early Bird Savings & Growth
item.description: Discover how TechCrunch’s Founder Summit 2026 accelerates startup growth, offers early‑bird discounts, and connects founders with top investors.
